title: 運命繋ぐ流星の軌跡 1話 追想の空

script.text: ――これはLizNoirが星見プロに入ってすぐの話

translations.en: ――This is the story right after LizNoir entered Hoshimi Productions

script.text: ……みなさん、今から一つ

translations.en: …Everyone‚ could you please‚

script.text: 私のお願いを聞いてほしいんです

translations.en: do me a favor from now on?

script.text: 今から特別に聴いてもらいたい歌があります

translations.en: There is a song I would like you to listen to specially from now on.

script.text: ……LizNoirではない、あるアイドルの曲です

translations.en: … It's not LizNoir‚ it's a song by some idol.

script.text: 三年前の曲だけど……私の大好きな歌

translations.en: Although it’s a song from 3 years ago… my favorite song.

script.text: 聴いてくれますか？

translations.en: Could you please listen?

script.text: ありがとう。では、彼女と一緒に歌いたいと思います

translations.en: Thank you. Then I'll sing with her.

script.text: どうぞ――

translations.en: Come on in――

script.text: ――四日前

translations.en: ――4 days ago

script.text: 莉央、大阪って、東京とは違った賑やかさがあるね

translations.en: Rio‚ Osaka has a different liveliness than Tokyo.

script.text: そうね、歴史的にも関西には関東と違った文化が――

translations.en: Yes‚ historically‚ the Kansai region had a different culture from the Kanto region…

script.text: あら？　こころと愛は？

translations.en: Huh? It's Kokoro and Ai‚ right?

script.text: 年少組なら、あそこで動画撮ってるけど

translations.en: The youngest members were filming a video over there.

script.text: うんうん、愛、いいよいいよー、はい！

translations.en: Yes‚ yes‚ Ai‚ Good‚ good~ Here!

script.text: そこで笑顔でＹ字バランスポーズをして！

translations.en: There‚ smile and pose with the letter ‘Y’!

script.text: ええーっ！？　ネタっぽくない？

translations.en: Eh~!? Doesn’t it seem like a joke?

script.text: 恥ずかしいよ、こころー

translations.en: I’m embarrassed~‚ Kokoro~

script.text: 愛はLizNoirのお笑い担当だからこれでいいの！

translations.en: Ai is in charge of LizNoir jokes‚ so it's okay!

script.text: ほら、いつもの媚びたスマイルを！

translations.en: Now‚ with your usual charming smile~!

script.text: それはこころの得意技でしょー！

translations.en: That’s Kokoro’s specialty~!

script.text: もー！

translations.en: I hate it~!

script.text: 口では嫌だと言いながら、やってくれる愛が

translations.en: Kokoro loves Ai

script.text: こころは愛おしい！

translations.en: who does it even though saying 'I hate it'!

script.text: ……あの子達は、あんなにはしゃいで

translations.en: …They're so excited

script.text: ライブの本番前だっていうのに、大した度胸ね……

translations.en: Even before the live performance‚ what a nerve…

script.text: もぐっもぐ、ごくん。二人は大阪を満喫してるよね

translations.en: munch munch‚ munching. The two are enjoying Osaka.

script.text: あっ、このたこ焼き美味しいよ、莉央も食べなよ

translations.en: Ah‚ this takoyaki is delicious‚ Rio‚ try it.

script.text: ……いつの間に買ったの？

translations.en: … When did you buy it?

script.text: 貴方も負けずに満喫してるわよ……

translations.en: You are enjoying it just as much…

script.text: せっかくのツアーだからね、少しはいいじゃないか

translations.en: It's been a while‚ so wouldn't it be okay?

script.text: はあ、たくましくなったのはいいけど緊張感は――

translations.en: Ha‚ it's good to be stronger‚ but the tension is――

script.text: どうしたの？　莉央

translations.en: What's the matter‚ Rio?

script.text: なんでもないわ。さっ、息抜きはもうおしまい

translations.en: Nothing. Okay‚ break time is over now.

script.text: 愛、こころも会場に戻るわよ

translations.en: Ai and Kokoro‚ let's go back to the concert hall.

script.text: はーい！

translations.en: yes~!
… huh?

script.text: ああ、この曲か……

translations.en: Ah‚ this song…

script.text: 長瀬麻奈が亡くなって、三年、か……

translations.en: It's been three years since Mana Nagase left…

script.text: あら、葵、こころと愛は？

translations.en: Huh? Aoi‚ what about Kokoro and Ai?

script.text: 誘ったんでしょ？

translations.en: Didn't you ask them to go with you?

script.text: あの二人はホテルに着くなり爆睡したよ

translations.en: They fell asleep as soon as they arrived at the hotel.

script.text: ライブで燃え尽きたみたいだね

translations.en: I guess they used all their energy during the live performance.

script.text: 次のツアー先は星見市だ

translations.en: The next tour is Hoshimi City.

script.text: 明日は早朝に出発しないといけないし

translations.en: Because We have to leave early tomorrow morning

script.text: 今夜は寝かせておくよ

translations.en: Let's just not wake them up tonight.

script.text: そう。じゃあ、久しぶりに

translations.en: Okay. Then it's been a while

script.text: 二人だけで打ち上げをしましょう

translations.en: Let's have a party two of us.

script.text: ああ、僕は明石焼きが食べてみたいな

translations.en: Ah~‚ I want to try Akashiyaki.

script.text: 貴方、昼間食べてたじゃない

translations.en: You ate it during the day.

script.text: 莉央、たこ焼きと明石焼きは違うみたいなんだ

translations.en: I heard takoyaki and akashiyaki are different‚ Rio

script.text: せっかくだから、試してみようよ

translations.en: It's a good opportunity‚ so let's try it

script.text: はいはい、でも、その後は甘いものにしましょう

translations.en: Yeah‚ yeah‚ but then let's go get something sweet.

script.text: 私、予約してる店があるの

translations.en: I have a reservation at a store

script.text: 大阪っていい町だよね、美味しいものがいっぱいある

translations.en: Osaka is a nice city. There are many delicious things

script.text: 僕、知らなかったよ。長生きはするものだね

translations.en: I didn't know. After living for a long time‚ now I know this too.

script.text: ……貴方、歳はこころ達とそう変わらないの

translations.en: ……Your age is not that different from Kokoro or Ai.

script.text: 分かってる？

translations.en: Did you know that?

script.text: 美味しいものか……ねえ、長瀬麻奈は

translations.en: Delicious things … By the way‚

script.text: 生きてる間に、美味しいものいっぱい食べられたのかな

translations.en: did Mana Nagase eat a lot of delicious thing while she was alive?

script.text: ――え？　何よ、突然

translations.en: ――Eh? What is it all of a sudden

script.text: 特別な意味はないよ

translations.en: It has no special meaning

script.text: 昼間、ここで彼女の曲が流れたから、思い出したんだ

translations.en: I heard Mana's song here during the day and it came to mind.

script.text: ……私も、今日、思い出しちゃったわ

translations.en: … Me too‚ I remembered it today

script.text: 彼女が生きていた間も

translations.en: So many things happened

script.text: 彼女がいなくなった後も

translations.en: while she was alive

script.text: 本当にいろいろなことがあった……

translations.en: and even after she was gone…

script.text: 忘れたくても、忘れられないわ

translations.en: Even if I want to forget‚ I can’t.

script.text: 莉央は一度、辞めかけたしね

translations.en: Rio tried to quit once

script.text: そうね

translations.en: Right.

script.text: それだけ彼女の喪失は私にとっても……

translations.en: Losing her meant me too… that much

script.text: 僕達はもう一度NEXT VENUSグランプリに

translations.en: We were able to go to the NEXT VENUS Grand Prix once again‚

script.text: 出られたけど、長瀬麻奈は出られなかった

translations.en: but Mana Nagase couldn't.

script.text: 妹の琴乃が出て優勝したけど

translations.en: Her younger sister Kotono competed and won

script.text: それで彼女は救われたのかな？

translations.en: but was she saved?

script.text: どうかしら、喜んでるとも思うし

translations.en: I wonder what it would be like. She might be happy

script.text: 悔しがってるかもしれないし

translations.en: or she might be angry

script.text: あの子は本当に自由奔放な子だったから

translations.en: Mana was a really free-spirited

script.text: 常識人の私には分からないわ

translations.en: so I don't know as a person with common sense.

script.text: 今の僕達を見たら、どう思うだろう

translations.en: What would she think if you saw us now?

script.text: 一言でいいから、感想がほしいな

translations.en: I'd like to hear‚ even if it's just one word.

script.text: 私もそう考えたことはあるけど……

translations.en: I used to think that too…

script.text: どんなに願っても、もう彼女とは話せない

translations.en: No matter how much I want to‚ I can't talk to her anymore.

script.text: ……でもそうね。聞いてみたい

translations.en: … But‚ yes. I want to ask

script.text: 私達は……本物のアイドルになれたのかしら

translations.en: Have we… become real idols?

script.text: あら、え？　琴乃だわ

translations.en: huh‚ eh? Kotono?

script.text: もしもし

translations.en: hello?

script.text: もしもし……ライブお疲れ様です。夜分にすみません

translations.en: hello… Thank you for your hard work on the live. Sorry for being late at night

script.text: いいけど、どうしたのよ

translations.en: It's okay‚ but what?

script.text: 何かあったの？

translations.en: Something happened?

script.text: 姉のことでお話があります

translations.en: I have something to tell you about my sister.

script.text: 明日、控室にお邪魔してもいいですか？

translations.en: Can I go to the dressing room tomorrow?

script.text: ――え？　麻奈のこと……？

translations.en: ――Eh? About Mana…?
